message:
Running command: # Cross-check: every checklist ID in markdown must appear in coverage_map
echo "=== Gap Analysis ===" 
MD_IDS=$(grep -oP '\[([A-Z0-9]+-\d+)\]' /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/verification_checklist.md | tr -d '[]' | sort -u)
MANIFEST_IDS=$(grep -oP 'checklist_id: \K[A-Z0-9]+-\d+' /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/scenario_manifest.yaml | sort -u)

echo "IDs in checklist  : $(echo "$MD_IDS" | wc -l)"
echo "IDs in manifest   : $(echo "$MANIFEST_IDS" | wc -l)"
echo ""
echo "IDs in checklist but NOT in manifest:"
comm -23 <(echo "$MD_IDS") <(echo "$MANIFEST_IDS") || echo "(none)"
echo ""
echo "IDs in manifest but NOT in checklist:"
comm -13 <(echo "$MD_IDS") <(echo "$MANIFEST_IDS") || echo "(none)"
echo ""

# Check every scenario file exists for each scenario listed in manifest
echo "=== Scenario file existence check ==="
grep "^    file:" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/scenario_manifest.yaml | awk '{print $2}' | while read f; do
  FULL="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/$f"
  if [ -f "$FULL" ]; then
    echo "OK  $f"
  else
    echo "MISSING  $f"
  fi
done

function.name: execute_bash
